tests.scenario: Stable app experience during normal usage
steps: Install and launch Headspace app on a supported Android device
Interact with the app for 30 minutes or more
Monitor app performance over a 30-day period
Verify app crash count for the user within the 30-day period
tests.expected_result: The app crashes 2 or fewer times within the 30-day period

tests.scenario: App crash boundary testing with prolonged usage
steps: Install and launch Headspace app on a supported Android device
Simulate 30 minutes of app interaction, followed by 29 days of inactivity
Interact with the app for an additional 30 minutes or more
Verify app crash count for the user within the subsequent 30-day period
tests.expected_result: The app crashes 2 or fewer times within the 30-day period after the second interaction

tests.scenario: Valid subscription login and immediate access to premium content
steps: Launch Headspace app and login with valid subscription credentials
Wait for 5 seconds to allow system to process login
Navigate to meditation content library
Verify access to premium content
tests.expected_result: The system displays correct subscription status and grants access to premium content within 5 seconds of login.

tests.scenario: Valid subscription login with unstable network and access to premium content
steps: Launch Headspace app on a device with unstable network connection
Login with valid subscription credentials
Wait for 5 seconds to allow system to process login
Navigate to meditation content library and verify access to premium content
tests.expected_result: The system displays correct subscription status and grants access to premium content within 5 seconds of login 95% of the time.

tests.scenario: New user views free meditation content
steps: Launch Headspace app and create a new account
Navigate to meditation content section
Verify free content is displayed
Check remaining free content indicator
tests.expected_result: The system displays at least 30 minutes of free meditation content with a clear indication of remaining free content available within the next 7-day period.

tests.scenario: New user exceeds free meditation content limit
steps: Launch Headspace app and create a new account
Navigate to meditation content section
Consume 30 minutes of free meditation content
Verify updated remaining free content indicator
tests.expected_result: The system indicates that no free meditation content is available until the next 7-day period.

tests.scenario: New user views subscription details with 14-day free trial
steps: Launch Headspace app and navigate to subscription options
Tap on 'View subscription details' or similar button
Verify the displayed subscription details
Check for 14-day free trial period information
tests.expected_result: The system displays the total subscription cost, including taxes, and offers a 14-day free trial period with a clear start and end date.

tests.scenario: New user views subscription details with no payment info required
steps: Launch Headspace app and navigate to subscription options
Tap on 'Start free trial' or similar button
Verify the payment information screen
Check if payment information is required during the trial period
tests.expected_result: The system does not require payment information during the 14-day free trial period.

tests.scenario: Happy Path: Load Meditation Session with Stable Internet
steps: Launch the Headspace app on a supported device with a stable internet connection
Select a meditation session from the list of available sessions
Wait for the session to load
Verify the session has started playing
tests.expected_result: The meditation session loads within 2 seconds with a success rate of 95% or higher.

tests.scenario: Edge Case: Load Meditation Session with Unstable Internet
steps: Launch the Headspace app on a supported device with an unstable internet connection
Select a meditation session from the list of available sessions
Wait for 5 seconds to account for potential buffering
Verify if the session loads or an error message appears
tests.expected_result: The app attempts to load the session but may display an error or buffering message due to the unstable connection.

tests.scenario: Valid subscription and completed sessions display accurate progress
steps: Launch Headspace app and log in with a valid subscription
Complete at least 5 meditation sessions to establish a streak
Navigate to the progress dashboard
Verify the displayed sessions completed and streak match the server data
tests.expected_result: The displayed progress information matches the actual data stored on the server with 99.9% accuracy.

tests.scenario: Edge case: Server data mismatch due to network issues
steps: Launch Headspace app and log in with a valid subscription
Simulate a network issue to cause a server data sync error
Navigate to the progress dashboard
Verify the app displays a 'syncing' or 'error' state and notifies the user
tests.expected_result: The app indicates a data sync issue and does not display inaccurate progress information.

tests.scenario: Happy-path meditation session with standard duration
steps: Launch the Headspace app and navigate to the meditation library
Select a meditation session with a duration between 5-30 minutes
Start the meditation session
Verify the session runs to completion
tests.expected_result: The system plays clear and audible voice guidance for the entire duration and displays a visual timer that accurately tracks the elapsed time with an accuracy of ± 1 second.

tests.scenario: Boundary meditation session with 5-minute duration
steps: Launch the Headspace app and navigate to the meditation library
Select a meditation session with a duration of exactly 5 minutes
Start the meditation session
Verify the session runs for 5 minutes ± 1 second
tests.expected_result: The system plays clear and audible voice guidance for the entire 5-minute duration and displays a visual timer that accurately tracks the elapsed time with an accuracy of ± 1 second.

tests.scenario: Happy-path weekly progress summary with multiple sessions
steps: Complete 3 meditation sessions on 3 consecutive days
Navigate to the app's progress tracking section
Verify the total number of sessions completed is displayed
Verify the weekly progress summary is displayed
tests.expected_result: The system displays a weekly progress summary showing the total number of sessions completed, total minutes meditated, and a streak counter that accurately reflects 3 consecutive days with at least one meditation session.

tests.scenario: Edge-case weekly progress summary with single session
steps: Complete 1 meditation session
Navigate to the app's progress tracking section
Verify the total number of sessions completed is displayed
Verify the streak counter is displayed
tests.expected_result: The system displays a weekly progress summary showing 1 session completed, the correct total minutes meditated, and a streak counter of 1 day.

tests.scenario: Happy-path save meditation and verify
steps: Launch Headspace app and navigate to meditation library
Select a meditation to save
Verify the meditation is displayed in the 'Saved' section within 2 navigation clicks
Play the saved meditation and verify it starts within 1 second
tests.expected_result: The saved meditation is playable within 1 second of selection and displayed in the 'Saved' section.

tests.scenario: Edge-case save same meditation twice
steps: Launch Headspace app and navigate to meditation library
Select a meditation to save
Save the same meditation again
Verify the meditation appears only once in the 'Saved' section
tests.expected_result: The meditation appears only once in the 'Saved' section and is still playable within 1 second of selection.

tests.scenario: Happy Path: Verify Progress Tracker Accuracy
steps: Launch Headspace app and log in
Complete a meditation session
Navigate to the progress tracker page
Verify the displayed data (sessions completed, total minutes practiced, streak counter)
tests.expected_result: The system displays the correct number of sessions completed, total minutes practiced, and a streak counter.

tests.scenario: Edge Case: Verify Streak Counter Resets After 24 Hours
steps: Launch Headspace app and log in
Complete a meditation session to establish a streak
Wait for 24 hours to pass without completing another session
Navigate to the progress tracker page and verify the streak counter
tests.expected_result: The system displays a streak counter of 0 or resets the streak.
